productDisplayName: Nike Men Prowl White Casual Shoes
description: Synthetic upper for protection and durability Perforations on the toebox and sides for greater breathability Lace-ups for a snug, customised Fit Cushioned collar and mesh tongue for greater comfort and ample ventilation Mildly cushioned sockliner for in-step comfort Brand name on the tongue and collar Embroidered brand logo on the sides Removable footbed to accommodate an orthotic Durable rubber outsole with herringbone pattern for maximum grip and traction Pivot points on the big toe mound and heel, coupled with circular and square lugs to offer a smooth ride Dynamic support system to adapt to your strideWarranty for manufacturing defects: 6 months (not valid on products with more than 20% discountWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
